channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: GTA 6 : ne croyez pas ceux qui vous donnent un prix… mais une bonne nouvelle se profile bien pour l’été
item.description: Take-Two n'est pas près d'annoncer un prix pour GTA 6 et ne s'est pas encore décidé à publier son troisième trailer... mais le rouleau compresseur marketing dédié au sixième opus de la reine de ses licences serait bel et bien sur le point de démarrer.

item.title: Volts, ampères et bornes bridées : le vrai casse-tête de la recharge illustré par la nouvelle Zeekr X électrique
item.description: La nouvelle Zeekr X vendue en France se recharge en 18 minutes en Europe, contre 15 minutes en Chine. Même batterie, même voiture, trois minutes d'écart, et la faute n'est pas du constructeur, mais de l'infrastructure européenne. Mais BYD pourrait bien venir à la rescousse de Zeekr.

item.title: SpaceX will launch Starship V3 for its first test flight today
item.description: Watch SpaceX launch Starship V3 for the first time.

item.title: 11 of the best coolers to keep your food and drinks chilled in the heat — recommended by a former outdoors editor
item.description: Quality coolers in all shapes and sizes, to see you through this heatwave and through the whole summer.

item.title: I tried the Insta360 Luna vlogging camera — and it’s going to give the DJI Pocket 4 some serious competition
item.description: Insta360 steps out of its 360 camera lane in a major way with its first vlogging camera, the Luna.

item.title: New oral drug shows success in reversing hair loss
item.description: It could be a major new player in a large market. Hair loss has long confounded the pharmaceutical industry, but there’s hope on the horizon. Veradermics has announced success in its late-stage clinical trial with a drug to reverse hair loss.

item.title: Demis Hassabis isn’t shying away from AI’s biggest questions
item.description: Google DeepMind’s CEO expects AGI to arrive by 2030. But even before it’s here, there are opportunities to seize and dangers to confront. Hello again, and welcome back to Fast Company’s Plugged In.For a decade, Google’s I/O developer conferences have told one consistent story: The AI age is here, and Google aims to lead it. The company’s progress can be measured by the AI-infused product announcements it makes during the show’s keynote. On Tuesday, CEO Sundar Pichai and other executives packed I/O 2026’s three-hour presentation so tightly with news—spanning Google Search, the Gemini app, Goog...

item.title: Amazon has all three of the best MacBooks you can buy on sale for record-low prices — the Air, the Pro, and even the Neo!
item.description: The MacBook Air, Neo, and Pro all have record-low prices at Amazon today thanks to the retailer's Memorial Day sale.

item.title: Samsung Movingstyle M7 Review: A Screen on Wheels
item.description: Made for those who hate having a TV in the home, Samsung’s Movingstyle monitor-on-wheels brings the entertainment when you need it and hides away in a closet when you don’t.

item.title: AI-generated code is outpacing every manual remediation model in existence': Nearly all firms admit they have shipped code they know is vulnerable
item.description: Organizations are rushing to push the code live, ignoring the obvious security risks.

item.title: Iran reportedly funneled billions through Binance to fund its military
item.description: The Wall Street Journal claims Iran continued to use Binance to funnel money despite tough sanctions.

item.title: Microsoft solves case of vanishing Windows 11 desktop — fix is rolling out for blank desktop, taskbar freezes and other flakiness
item.description: Fed up with bits of Windows 11 being flaky of late? Microsoft has fixed bugs that cause a blank desktop, taskbar freezes and more.

item.title: Xiaomi casse déjà le prix de la Redmi Pad 2 9.7, sa nouvelle tablette avec écran 2K 120 Hz
item.description: La Xiaomi Redmi Pad 2 9.7 a beau embarquer un écran rafraîchi à 120 Hz, son prix actuel est plus que contenu : Xiaomi propose en effet cette tablette à 181 euros au lieu de 231 euros. Le tarif peut même baisser encore plus grâce à un bonus reprise.

item.title: Could your CEO be the weakest link when it comes to AI security? New study warns execs are 'knowingly bypassing safeguards because the perceived benefits outweigh the risks'
item.description: New research finds 62% of senior leaders use unapproved shadow AI (but only 31% of other workers), prioritizing productivity over compliance.

item.title: GTA 6 is locked in for November 19, 2026, according to Take-Two Interactive, despite delay rumors — and marketing starts soon
item.description: GTA 6 has been the centerpiece of gamer discussions with hopes of imminent marketing amid delay worries, but answers have been given by Take-Two Interactive.

item.title: Best Vacuum Cleaner (2026): Cordless Vacuums, Robot Vacuums, Dysons
item.description: Looking for all our top recommended vacuums? Here are our favorites in every style we’ve tested, from stick vacs to robot vacuums.

item.title: Pourquoi SpaceX a stoppé le décollage de la fusée Starship V3 au dernier moment
item.description: Le lancement de la fusée Starship V3 a été annulé à 40 secondes du décollage en raison d'un problème technique. Il s'agit d'un vol crucial pour SpaceX.

item.title: The Morning After: The biggest news from Google I/O 2026
item.description: Google I/O 2026 kicked off this week and to no one's surprise, it was almost completely about AI.

item.title: Samsung’s memory chip employees negotiated $340,000 bonuses this year
item.description: Details have emerged about a tentative deal struck between Samsung and semiconductor employees who had threatened to strike. The deal reportedly makes some workers eligible for average annual bonuses of $340,000. The proposed 18-day strike had hinged on Samsung's bonus cap for employees in the semiconductor division and followed a substantial rise in the possible […]...

item.title: The 13 Best Fans to Buy Before It Gets Hot Again (2026)
item.description: Swap out your creaky old box fan for a new model that lights up, mists, or even follows you around the room.

item.title: AI code security risk: The need for a smarter layer between detection and remediation
item.description: AI is accelerating code and risk. Security needs smarter triage beyond detection to remediation.

item.title: All the Fancy Measuring Devices Used in Science Rely on Two Stone-Age Techniques
item.description: The multifarious methods we use to gather experimental data ultimately boil down to counting or comparing.

item.title: The Xiaomi 15T is an impressive mid-ranger that feels way more premium than the Google Pixel 10a
item.description: The Xiaomi 15T delivers an upper mid-range experience for an impressively affordable price.

item.title: Don't miss the big game while traveling this summer — a VPN can ensure you never miss a kick of the World Cup 2026 and protect your personal data online in the process
item.description: Taking a summer holiday shouldn't mean missing out on your favorite sports. We explain how a top-tier VPN helps you access your home streaming platforms from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The LA28 typography is made of 4 custom fonts
item.description: Each font in the LA28 type family is designed for a different purpose. The last time Los Angeles hosted the Olympic Games, designers had a relatively simple typographic system. It used the italic sans-serif Univers 66 as its logotype along with a blocky stencil-style “LA84” mark that appeared on venue and urban signage. More than 40 years later, the 2028 Los Angeles Games will use an entire bespoke four-font book....

item.title: Microsoft’s consumer marketing chief to leave next year
item.description: Yusuf Mehdi, executive vice president and consumer chief marketing officer at Microsoft, is leaving the company after 35 years. Mehdi announced his departure in an internal memo on Thursday, noting that he will leave Microsoft next year. He will remain focused on marketing for Windows, Copilot for consumers and the Microsoft 365 consumer business until […]...

item.title: Malaysia's under-16 social media ban goes into effect on June 1
item.description: Malaysia is requiring social networks to implement age verification methods starting on June 1.

item.title: Why data fragmentation is becoming a business problem, not just a technical one
item.description: Discover why data fragmentation is a business problem, not a technical one, and how leading organizations are acting across data boundaries.

item.title: The world's greatest laptop… almost. Dell's 2026 XPS 16 lands almost every blow perfectly, with only one exception: the ports
item.description: Dell's back with a vengeance, if the latest 16-inch XPS is anything to go by, the word "ultrabook" might not be ultra enough.

item.title: I called the Garmin Tactix 8 the 'ultimate military watch' in my review, and it's $250 off for Memorial Day
item.description: The 4.5-star Garmin Tactix 8 is an incredible military watch and for a limited time only, its price has been slashed by $250

item.title: The DJI Mini 4K is 'the most capable drone for beginners for the money' — and it's now back to a record-low price on Amazon
item.description: This DJI Mini 4K has crashed to its lowest-ever price on Amazon — and we think it's the ideal drone for beginners.

item.title: Remixer des musiques avec l’IA : la nouvelle fonction payante de Spotify arrive bientôt
item.description: Spotify prposera bientôt un outil d'IA générative pour remixer des musiques, en partenariat avec Universal Music. Les utilisateurs devront payer un supplément pour accéder à cette fonctionnalité, qui nécessite par ailleurs l'accord des artistes.

item.title: Valve Steam Controller Review (2026): Wait for the Steam Machine
item.description: Without the context of Valve’s Steam Machine (which is still MIA), this controller can’t fully dazzle players yet.

item.title: Think iPhones have become boring? Apple could debut quad-curved screens on the iPhone 19 Pro series — and you know what that means for future Android phones
item.description: The iPhone 19 Pro will reportedly have a quad-curved screen, though this isn't actually a new idea.

item.title: Why account recovery is now the weakest link in security
item.description: Attackers bypass MFA by exploiting helpdesk-driven account recovery workflows.

item.title: The Hisense 65-inch U7 TV hits record-low price in Amazons Memorial Day sale — save over $100 this weekend
item.description: Find the best TV deal at Amazon. Save 13% on the Hisense 65-inch U7 TV at Amazon.

item.title: GeForce Now vous donne enfin le contrôle total sur la qualité de votre streaming
item.description: GeForce Now permet désormais de choisir manuellement le codec de streaming vidéo qu'il utilise.
